description_long: This is a highly customized white coupe car featuring a wide body kit, large rear wing, and distinctive rainbow Apple Computer Inc. branding on the hood, roof, and sides. The car has a low, aggressive stance with flared fenders and prominent aerodynamic elements, including a front splitter and rear diffuser. The wheels are multi-spoke with a striking iridescent finish, adding to the car's unique visual appeal. The number '89' and various sponsor decals are visible on the doors and hood, emphasizing its racing-inspired design. The windows are tinted, and the car appears to have a two-door configuration with a fastback roofline. The overall look is reminiscent of a modified Porsche 911, likely a RWB (RAUH-Welt Begriff) build, blending classic sports car lines with modern racing aesthetics.
description: A white, wide-bodied coupe car with Apple Computer Inc. rainbow branding, iridescent wheels, and a large rear wing, styled in a racing-inspired RWB Porsche 911 manner.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the large rear wing, Apple logo on the roof, and wide fenders.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rainbow wheels, Apple branding, and racing decals.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the RAUH-Welt banner, racing number, and aggressive front splitter.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the wide body kit and rear wing.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
